name: Navly First-Party Host
description: Publishes Navly first-party capability-oriented host tools and bundled skills for live OpenClaw channels.

repoRoot.description: Absolute Navly repo root used to load the first-party publication manifest and runtime modules.

dataPlatformEnvPath.description: Absolute path to the Navly data-platform env file for live runtime defaults.

defaultChannel.description: Fallback channel kind when plugin tool context does not expose a channel.

channelAccountRef.description: Optional fixed channel_account_ref injected into Navly host ingress.

identityAliasNamespace.description: Optional alias namespace override for requesterSenderId evidence.

defaultScopeRef.description: Optional fallback scope_ref when a tool call omits it.

defaultOrgId.description: Optional fallback OrgId for live Qinqin reads.

defaultAppSecret.description: Optional fallback AppSecret for live Qinqin reads.

transportKind.description: Runtime data transport kind. Defaults to live.

businessTimezone.description: Timezone used to derive default business_date when omitted.

scopeOrgMap.description: Optional mapping from Navly scope_ref to Qinqin OrgId.
